name: Old Pali Road
tagline: A paved historic road reclaimed by the jungle — the easiest walk to dramatic Ko'olau cliff views.
parking: Park at the Pali Lookout parking lot ($7 non-resident, free for Hawaii IDs; reservations may be required for non-residents via gostateparks.hawaii.gov)
bestTime: Late afternoon when the light hits the cliffs — but expect wind at the lookout any time of day
kamaaina: Free parking with Hawaii state ID
talkStory: This is a 2-mile round trip flat walk on an old abandoned highway — perfect for anyone who wants dramatic scenery without breaking a sweat. The road is mostly paved but crumbling in spots with jungle growing through the cracks, which honestly makes it cooler. You'll pass through bamboo groves and banyan trees with killer views of the windward coast. It's also a significant Hawaiian historical site — the Battle of Nu'uanu was fought here. Super windy at the top, bring a light jacket.
